children.heading: Availability based upon prior year distributions
children.label: a Availability based upon prior year distributions

children.text: From the amounts appropriated under for any fiscal year and available for allotment under this subsection, the Secretary shall allot to each State an amount which bears the same ratio to the available amounts for that fiscal year as the amounts provided by the Secretary under the provisions of law listed in paragraph (2) to the State and entities in the State for fiscal year 1981 bore to the total amount appropriated for such provisions of law for fiscal year 1981.section 300w of this title

children.label: A
children.text: The authority for grants under for preventive health service programs for the control of rodents.section 247b of this title

children.label: B
children.text: The authority for grants under for establishing and maintaining community and school-based fluoridation programs.section 247b of this title

children.label: C
children.text: The authority for grants under for preventive health service programs for hypertension.section 247b of this title

children.label: D
children.text: Sections 247b–1 and 247b–2 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: E
children.text: Section 246(d) of this title.1

children.label: F
children.text: Section 255(a) of this title.1

children.label: G
children.text: Sections 300d–1, 300d–2, and 300d–3 of this title.111

children.heading: Population
children.label: b Population
children.text: From the amount required to be made available under for allotments under this subsection for any fiscal year, the Secretary shall make allotments to each State on the basis of the population of the State.section 300w(b) of this title

children.heading: Distribution of appropriated funds not allotted
children.label: c Distribution of appropriated funds not allotted

children.text: one or more States have not submitted an application or description of activities in accordance with for the fiscal year;section 300w–4 of this title
one or more States have notified the Secretary that they do not intend to use the full amount of their allotment; or
some State allotments are offset or repaid under ;section 300w–5(b)(3) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: receives a request from the governing body of an Indian tribe or tribal organization within any State that funds under this part be provided directly by the Secretary to such tribe or organization, and

children.label: B
children.text: determines that the members of such tribe or tribal organization would be better served by means of grants made directly by the Secretary under this part,

The Secretary shall reserve for the purpose of paragraph (1) from amounts that would otherwise be allotted to such State under subsection (a) an amount equal to the amount which bears the same ratio to the State’s allotment for the fiscal year involved as the total amount provided or allotted for fiscal year 1981 by the Secretary to such tribe or tribal organization under the provisions of law referred to in subsection (a) bore to the total amount provided or allotted for such fiscal year by the Secretary to the State and entities (including Indian tribes and tribal organizations) in the State under such provisions of law.

The amount reserved by the Secretary on the basis of a determination under this subsection shall be granted to the Indian tribe or tribal organization serving the individuals for whom such a determination has been made.

In order for an Indian tribe or tribal organization to be eligible for a grant for a fiscal year under this subsection, it shall submit to the Secretary a plan for such fiscal year which meets such criteria as the Secretary may prescribe.
The terms “Indian tribe” and “tribal organization” have the same meaning given such terms in section 5304(b) and (c) of title 25.1

children.heading: Report on equitable distribution of available funds
children.label: e Report on equitable distribution of available funds

children.text: the financial resources of the various States,
the populations of the States, and
any other factor which the Secretary may consider appropriate.
